fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 65 is inverted. The clamping logic is incorrectly executed when `clamp` is False and skipped when `clamp` is True, instead of the other way around.

spec.expr: (clamp and (y__5 >= min(y0, y1) and y__5 <= max(y0, y1))) or (not clamp and y__5 == y__1)

constraints.intent: After the conditional block, the resulting value y__5 should be clamped if clamp is true, or equal to the original interpolated value y__1 if clamp is false.
The parameter t is in the range [0,1] if and only if x is within the segment [x0, x1].
The interpolated y-value is within its original range if and only if the parameter t is in [0,1].
